_metadata.description: Weighted skill taxonomy for semantic job-candidate matching. Each entry maps a canonical skill to its aliases and related skills with weights (0-1). Weight=1.0 means equivalent/identical. Weight=0.7 means strongly related (same ecosystem). Weight=0.4 means moderately related. Weight=0.2 means weakly related. v2.0: expanded with Swiss market domains (medical, legal, construction, finance), multilingual DE/FR/IT aliases, and Phase 1 embedding-tier support.
